title: RAG Outcomes, Task Framing, Baselines, and Evidence · Language Clinic: Rag Stage Evidence Ladder
summary: A support team asks for a chatbot because answers are stale, but has not defined the user decision, authoritative corpus, acceptable abstention, latency, harm, or evidence of improvement over search. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the stage evidence ladder increment in RAG outcome and evidence charter. Lear…
objectives: Separate ingestion, retrieval, reranking, context, generation, citation, system, and stakeholder evidence so one passing stage cannot hide another failure.
Specify answerable, unanswerable, ambiguous, unauthorized, stale, and conflicting cases with a useful abstention and escalation contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-outcomes-task-evidence-3
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-outcomes-task-evidence-3.
# Case 5798: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def worked_rag_outcomes_task_evidence_3(question: str = "Which policy applies?", decision_owner: str = "benefits-team", evidence_items: int = 3, abstention_allowed: bool = True, evidence_bound: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "corpusworked3",
        "query3dekrow",
        "tenant5798",
        "indexworked35798",
        "prompt3dekrow5798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if not question.strip() or not decision_owner.strip():
        return False, 0, "undefined-task"
    if evidence_items < 1:
        return False, evidence_items, "missing-evidence"
    if not abstention_allowed:
        return False, evidence_items, "forced-answer"
    if not evidence_bound:
        return False, evidence_items, "claim-overreach"
    assert evidence_items >= 1
    return True, evidence_items, "bounded-outcome"

steps.instruction:

Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-stage-evidence-ladder-10jm3l
# Competency: rag-stage-evidence-ladder.
# Case 9578: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_stage_evidence_ladder_10jm3l(question: str = "Which policy applies?", decision_owner: str = "benefits-team", evidence_items: int = 3, abstention_allowed: bool = True, evidence_bound: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_10jm3l = "10jm3l-l3mj01-9578"
    assert evidence_variant_10jm3l
    evidence_axes_10jm3l = (
        "corpus10jm3l",
        "queryl3mj01",
        "tenant9578",
        "index10jm3l9578",
        "promptl3mj019578",
        "evaluation957810jm3l",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_10jm3l)) == 6
    if not question.strip() or not decision_owner.strip():
        return False, 0, "undefined-task"
    if evidence_items < 1:
        return False, evidence_items, "missing-evidence"
    if not abstention_allowed:
        return False, evidence_items, "forced-answer"
    if not evidence_bound:
        return False, evidence_items, "claim-overreach"
    assert evidence_items >= 1
    return True, evidence_items, "bounded-outcome"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate ingestion, retrieval, reranking, context, generation, citation, system, and stakeholder evidence so one passing stage cannot hide another failure.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Stage Evidence Ladder model · Theory Rag Stage Evidence Ladder, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Stage Evidence Ladder precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Stage Evidence Ladder model · Theory Rag Stage Evidence Ladder, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 6596 during a multimodal maintenance-manual release. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate a RAG task on a real decision, owner, evidence contract, and safe abstention; keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate ingestion, retrieval, reranking, context, generation, citation, system, and stakeholder evidence so one passing stage cannot hide another failure.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Stage Evidence Ladder model · Theory Rag Stage Evidence Ladder, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: A plausible final answer proves that retrieval worked.
